revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing categories I made programmatically

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:refreshing to try to clear the links needed category]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]] [[Category:refreshing to try to clear the links needed category]][[Category:Ancient Egypt templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{draft categories| [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]] [[Category:refreshing to try to clear the links needed category]] }} [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[en:Category:Ancient Egypt templates]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
revision.text: {{draft categories| [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]] [[Category:refreshing to try to clear the links needed category]] }} [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[en:Category:Ancient Egypt templates]] [[en:Category:Ancient Egypt templates]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: remove obsolete category New uncategorized original categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9120500)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
